title: Construction Project Management Help
excerpt:
Hi, 
Does anyone have a template they would like to share for their Construction Management workspace? I’ve been tweaking a few templates, but haven’t found one that is suitable. I would like to have a high level board, …

posts.author: odelegacy (Calvin Ode)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Does anyone have a template they would like to share for their Construction Management workspace? I’ve been tweaking a few templates, but haven’t found one that is suitable. I would like to have a high level board, a board that I can estimate a single project on, and a project schedule board after an estimate has been approved. I’ve got a decent workflow but I can’t get a project created in the high level view to be easily tracked after it’s estimate board and project schedule board have been completed.

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @odelegacy - We’ve worked with several clients in the construction industry, but everyone’s boards and flows are quite different. I’d be happy to chat with you on Zoom to see what you have built so far and give you some tips and advice. We offer a limited number of no-charge strategy sessions in the community each week. You can book one here: Book a call with Polished Geek: Do more with monday․com

posts.author: ConradKnight (Alex)
posts.cookedHtml: The point of the template is that it just gives you the basis, but you need to customize it based on your business needs.

posts.author: himani.bhuradia (Himani Bhuradia)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve used the templates of Deep Space software to manage my construction projects. You can check if you want.
